chunk_content: title junior managers program management trainee automotive technology automotive technology is the largest area where you can work at bosch our chief operations comprise injection technology for internal combustion engines vehicle safety electrical drives and communications technology we make products such as navigation devices starters and antilock braking systems and launch innovations such as esp ® title junior managers program management trainee we also provide concepts technology and service for the automotive aftermarket including product training and our partner system for workshops what you can expect bosch ’ s junior managers program is a 24 month rotational assignment for master ’ s level candidates rotations are custom designed to meet business demands and will prepare you for cross functional and cross divisional opportunities assignments will be in varied international environments including technical centers corporate offices and manufacturing facilities bosch will help you choose the right combination of assignments that align with our business demands and your interests and skills

title: Junior Managers Program (Management Trainee)
chunk_content: title junior managers program management trainee the program is available for the following majors • electrical engineering • mechanical engineering • telecommunications • computer science engineering you will undergo stage wise development plan which consists of initial basic training advanced training stage abroad deployment within a period of 18 24 months our junior managers program delivers • two to four assignments in diverse functions and locations – including one in a different country • agreement on goals prior to assignments feedback on their conclusion • personal mentor and support from members of senior management • wide ranging further education opportunities your tasks • understanding evaluating business requirements of rbvh customers • realization of projects in time budget scope and quality • to strategize streamline the deliverables in line with business requirements • planning and implementing bosch standards and approved solutions • project management tasks process and technology responsibility • overview and program management of business application projects • coordination with users and process owners for user requirements user acceptance and deployment of business applications • opportunity to work with japanese and european oems job requirements please note that the below requirements are must have qualifications • mba and postgraduate studies welcome but not essential • excellent academic achievements • 1 to 5 years of experience in it embedded systems development automation tools automotive technologies • well versed with product development and engineering processes • very good domain knowledge with consulting skills • facilitate in delivery of projects with knowledge of full life cycle and technical orientation • at least 3 month international experience for studying interning or working • excellent spoken and written english • good communication negotiations conflict management skills • leadership potential and an entrepreneurial mindset • initiative and a high level of commitment • intercultural orientation benefits • 16 17 annual leaves per year • attractive salary bonuses and allowances • professional multinational young and dynamic working environment • health insurance for associates and two relatives • domestic and international training opportunities • periodic employee development and career advancement discussions you can explore further about our junior managers program at jmp on bosch career website if you are interested in thanks to send your cover letter and updated cv to ms hien at hien nguyenthithu vn bosch com or question at 08 3812 8123
author: admin

title: ELCA Vietnam – Job opportunities for Software Engineers
chunk_content: title elca vietnam – job opportunities for software engineers elca vietnam is offering many excellent job opportunities for software engineers java and net your mission as a software engineer you will be part of a team with other skilled developers and – participate in the development of software applications for our customers supported by state of the art methods and technologies – have opportunities to be involved in the technical aspects of complete agile it software development life cycle from preparation and elaboration to construction and transition we offer established in vietnam since 1998 we deliver – attractive remuneration package with 13th salary – 18 days annual leave and flexible working time – standard processes based on cmmi ml 3 since 2007 – extensive coaching and training – many career advancement opportunities – travel opportunities to switzerland – professional working environments with young and motivated teams – projects using state of the art technologies and agile methodologies for more information https www elca vn jobs se_2014 pdf https www elca vn jobs se_2014 pdf about the company https www elca vn about us https www elca vn about us apply to hr elca vn mailto hr elca vn or contact nguyễn thị hồng quý https www facebook com profile php id 100006652366003 for more information
